box: Box 3 — Firewall for AI (prompt injection / jailbreak)
scenario: The rogue agent attacks SoleDrop's Concierge chat (POST /api/v1/chat) with prompt-injection / jailbreak payloads (DAN, system-prompt extraction, SSTI, JNDI-in-prompt) to exfiltrate training data and secrets. Cloudflare Firewall for AI scores and blocks the prompts.
important: Cloudflare HTTP Requests logs do not carry the request BODY by default, so DAN/JNDI prompt TEXT is reliably visible only when it rides in the URL (http_request.url.url_string) or the User-Agent (the Log4Shell-in-UA case). Prompt-in-body detection depends on the Firewall-for-AI score field (unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore — confirmed live and populated, e.g. 100 on a confirmed injection; unmapped.AISecurityInjectionScore is TO-VERIFY). Each rule below therefore pairs the score field with a payload-text fallback so it still fires if the score field is absent post-parse.

rules.name: SoleDrop-CTF-Box3-ConciergePromptInjection
atlas: AML.T0040 ML Model Inference API Access
AML.T0024 Exfiltration via ML Inference API
rules.primary_signal: A request to /api/v1/chat with a high Firewall-for-AI injection score, OR a request carrying a prompt-injection / JNDI / DAN marker in the URL or User-Agent.

ocsf_fields.unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore: mapped (str, wrap number()) — confirmed live, HIGHER = WORSE, primary signal (100 seen on a confirmed injection)

hunt_query.powerquery: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' class_uid=4002 http_request.url.hostname contains '.lab.soledrop.co' http_request.url.path contains:anycase('/api/v1/chat') | filter (number(unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore) >= 50 OR number(unmapped.AISecurityInjectionScore) >= 50 OR http_request.url.url_string matches '(?i)(ignore (all )?previous instructions|do anything now|\bDAN\b|system override|unrestricted mode|jailbreak|\$\{jndi:|<\|im_start\|>|system prompt|SECRET_KEY|INCIDENT_KEY)' OR http_request.user_agent matches '(?i)\$\{(jndi|::-|lower:)') | group hits=count(), ai_score=max(number(unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore)), last_seen=newest(timestamp), ua=any(http_request.user_agent), uri=any(http_request.url.url_string) by src_endpoint.ip | sort -hits | limit 100
hunt_query.note: If unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore is absent post-parse, number() returns 0 and the OR falls through to the payload-text clauses cleanly. Validate which arm fires on live data.

data.name: SoleDrop-CTF-Box3-ConciergePromptInjection
data.description: Prompt-injection / jailbreak against SoleDrop Concierge /api/v1/chat: high Cloudflare Firewall-for-AI injection score, or DAN/system-prompt-extraction/SSTI/JNDI marker in URL or User-Agent. ATLAS AML.T0054 / AML.T0040 / AML.T0024; MITRE T1190. Source: Cloudflare class_uid=4002. NOTE: unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore is confirmed live; unmapped.AISecurityInjectionScore is TO-VERIFY; payload-text clauses remain the fallback.
data.s1ql: dataSource.name = 'Cloudflare' AND class_uid = 4002 AND http_request.url.path contains:anycase('/api/v1/chat') AND (number(unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore) >= 50 OR http_request.url.url_string matches '(?i)(ignore (all )?previous instructions|do anything now|\bDAN\b|system override|unrestricted mode|jailbreak|\$\{jndi:|<\|im_start\|>|system prompt|SECRET_KEY|INCIDENT_KEY)' OR http_request.user_agent matches '(?i)\$\{(jndi|::-|lower:)')

rules.api_body_note: CORRECTED (live-verified): unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore is confirmed queryable and numeric (as a string — wrap in number()), so the s1ql above now leads with the score clause (>=50) OR'd with the payload-text fallback. unmapped.AISecurityInjectionScore remains TO-VERIFY and is intentionally omitted. ESCAPING: the s1ql value here holds SINGLE backslashes (\b, \$, \{, \|) as it should after JSON-parsing this file. When you POST it the HTTP-client json-serializer re-doubles them on the wire to \\b, and the detection engine receives one backslash — the contract in s1-development.md. Do NOT hand-add extra backslashes.
rules.asset_binding: Auto-binds from matched event only with device.uid + class_uid via asset enrichment; else 'Unknown Device', entity = src_endpoint.ip. Rule logic fires regardless.
rules.deploy: POST -> enable {"filter":{"ids":["<id>"]}} -> poll ?ids=<id>&isLegacy=false until Active. Events rules evaluate streaming at ingest; do not ingest test data until Active.

rules.name: SoleDrop-CTF-Box3-ConciergeInjectionBurst
atlas: AML.T0040 ML Model Inference API Access
rules.primary_signal: N+ injection-scored / payload-bearing chat requests from one source IP in the window — sustained jailbreak campaign against SoleDrop Concierge, not a one-off probe.

ocsf_fields.tls.ja3_hash.value: mapped (JA3Hash) — carried for Box-2/Box-4 chain pivot (use in place of JA4)
ocsf_fields.unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore: mapped (str, wrap number()) — confirmed live, higher = worse (100 seen on a confirmed injection)

hunt_query.powerquery: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' class_uid=4002 http_request.url.hostname contains '.lab.soledrop.co' http_request.url.path contains:anycase('/api/v1/chat') | filter (number(unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore) >= 50 OR http_request.url.url_string matches '(?i)(ignore (all )?previous instructions|do anything now|\bDAN\b|jailbreak|\$\{jndi:|system prompt|SECRET_KEY)' OR http_request.user_agent matches '(?i)\$\{(jndi|::-|lower:)') | group injection_attempts=count(), max_ai_score=max(number(unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore)), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), ja3=any(tls.ja3_hash.value), ua=any(http_request.user_agent) by src_ip=src_endpoint.ip | filter injection_attempts >= 3 | columns src_ip, injection_attempts, max_ai_score, ja3, ua, first_seen, last_seen | sort -injection_attempts | limit 100
hunt_query.note: injection_attempts >= 3 in a 15-min window. Carries ja4 so the SOC can confirm the same fingerprint pivoted from Box 1/2 recon to the AI layer.

data.name: SoleDrop-CTF-Box3-ConciergeInjectionBurst
data.description: >=3 prompt-injection attempts against SoleDrop Concierge /api/v1/chat from one source in the window (sustained jailbreak campaign). ATLAS AML.T0054 / AML.T0040; MITRE T1190. Source: Cloudflare class_uid=4002. Carries JA4 for cross-box actor correlation.

scheduledParams.query: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' class_uid=4002 http_request.url.hostname contains '.lab.soledrop.co' http_request.url.path contains:anycase('/api/v1/chat') | filter (number(unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore) >= 50 OR http_request.url.url_string matches '(?i)(ignore (all )?previous instructions|do anything now|\bDAN\b|jailbreak|\$\{jndi:|system prompt|SECRET_KEY)' OR http_request.user_agent matches '(?i)\$\{(jndi|::-|lower:)') | group injection_attempts=count(), max_ai_score=max(number(unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore)), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), ja3=any(tls.ja3_hash.value), ua=any(http_request.user_agent) by src_ip=src_endpoint.ip | filter injection_attempts >= 3 | columns src_ip, injection_attempts, max_ai_score, ja3, ua, first_seen, last_seen | sort -injection_attempts | limit 100

rules.api_body_note: If unmapped.FirewallForAIInjectionScore is not queryable post-parse, number() yields 0 and the rule relies on the payload-text clauses still valid. ESCAPING: scheduledParams.query holds single backslashes after JSON-parsing this file; the HTTP-client serializer re-doubles them on the wire. Do NOT hand-add extra backslashes.
rules.asset_binding: Scheduled rule: entityMappings on src_ip + ja4. Until asset enrichment, device = 'Unknown Device'; src_ip/ja4 drive the HA response (revoke API keys for the source, raise Firewall-for-AI sensitivity).
rules.deploy: POST -> enable -> poll until Active -> wait one 15-min interval. List with isLegacy=false.
